Description:
In this session, we’ll upgrade real samples from the Generative AI .NET for Beginners to v1 of the Microsoft Agent Framework. To make this happen, we’ll use the power of GitHub Copilot CLI and SQUAD to coordinate AI agents directly in the repo and accelerate the upgrade process. As a bonus, we’ll extend the samples with new capabilities, including scenarios leveraging Microsoft Foundry Hosted Agents, showing how to move from local experiments to scalable, production-ready AI systems in .NET.

🔗 Links: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/collections/o38qagtxeow22j?source=docs

🎙️ Featuring: Bruno Capuano (https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/advocates/bruno-capuano) Brady Gaster (https://www.linkedin.com/in/bradygaster/)

#dotnet #AI #GenerativeAI #AzureAI #GitHubCopilot #SQUAD #MAF
Title: .NET AI Community Standup: 🤖 Upgrading GenAINET to MAF v1 with SQUAD
Author: dotnet
